Hotel Policy

⚠️ Late check-out charges may apply. Early check-in subject to availability.
💰 Advance Booking & Payment Policy
✅ Advance Payment Required
Advance payment is mandatory to confirm your room booking via WhatsApp or phone call. Room will only be reserved after payment is received.
❌ Non-Refundable Advance
Once advance payment is made, it is strictly non-refundable in case of cancellation. No exceptions.
📌 Payment Modes: GPay · PhonePe · Paytm · Bank Transfer
Account details will be shared on WhatsApp after booking confirmation.
🪪 ID & Guest Policy
✅Valid Government ID is mandatory for all guests — Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, Driving License
💑Couples Welcome — Unmarried couples are allowed with valid ID proof of both guests
✅Local ID guests are allowed with valid government issued ID
❌Guests without valid ID will NOT be permitted to check in under any circumstances

📍 Jammu Airport Drop service · Advance booking required · WhatsApp karo for pickup details
📌 General Hotel Rules
🚭Smoking is strictly prohibited inside rooms and common areas. Allowed only at designated outdoor spots.
🍺Consumption of alcohol inside rooms or hotel premises is not permitted.
🔕Guests must maintain silence after 11:00 PM. Loud music, noise, or disturbance will not be tolerated.
🐾Pets and animals are strictly not allowed inside the hotel premises.
⚡Any damage to hotel property will be assessed and charged to the responsible guest.
👥Only registered guests are permitted in rooms. Outside visitors are not allowed inside rooms.
💑Couples Allowed — Both married and unmarried couples welcome with valid government ID of both persons.

📜 Terms & Disclaimer
Hotel management reserves the right to refuse check-in to any guest without assigning a reason. Booking is only confirmed after advance payment is received. Room rates may vary by season and availability. The hotel is not responsible for loss or theft of any personal belongings. In case of any dispute, Jammu jurisdiction will apply. By using this website, you agree to all the above terms and conditions.
